title: EMBRACE GRACE - 211info
text: LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith based support group that focuses on goal setting and planning. Participants can attend the annual infant and children's clothing swap and baby shower. Offers information on additional community resources. Accepts gently used maternity clothing and baby furniture and clothing. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Single and pregnant women Hours: Monday 6pm and Tuesday 5pm Email (971) 420-6801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 420-6801 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Tillamook County Services: Baby Furniture Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs * Infants/Toddlers Clothing Donation Programs * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - LITTLE FREE PANTRY HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP
